description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named windows that runs on push to master and tags matching v*. The workflow has three jobs: test-windows, package-exe, and package-msi, all running on windows-latest. The test-windows job checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt, sets up nmake and various dependencies, builds and tests the project. The package-exe and package-msi jobs depend on test-windows, set up the build environment, build the project, download dependencies, package the project into exe and msi installers respectively, and upload them as artifacts and to a release.
